# SBA Local Assistance 77084 SBDC Results for Harris County

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

The SBA local-assistance SBDC search for ZIP 77084 identifies local resources in Harris County, Texas and displays four SBA Resource Partner SBDC results: Texas SBDC Houston Lee College. Texas SBDC Houston Prairie View A&M.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns ecosystem navigation, technology, training and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

- ## Resource summary
- The SBA local-assistance SBDC search for ZIP 77084 identifies local resources in Harris County, Texas and displays four SBA Resource Partner SBDC results:

- Texas SBDC Houston Prairie View A&M.
- Texas SBDC Houston San Jacinto College.
- Texas SBDC Houston University of Houston.
